title: 150 Blow Molded White Plastic Folding Chairs with 6 Chair Cart Bundle
features: Perfect for anyone in the event industry or if you're a hosting a party.
This bundle includes 150 blow-molded white plastic folding chairs and 6 chair carts.

Each cart has a capacity of 27 chairs and drastically eases the process of setting up and taking down your venue and seamlessly streamlines the overall process so you can accomplish more in less time.
